evals.name: create-single-artifact
evals.prompt: I just fetched NYC apartment listings from StreetEasy for zip 11206. There are 47 listings in a CSV with columns: address, price, sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, date_listed. Save this as an artifact.
assertions: Has ARTIFACT.md with YAML frontmatter (name, params, outputs)
Uses numeric DIKW prefix (0- for data)
Outputs in out/<date>/ directory
Artifact root contains a .gitignore with 'out/*' + '!out/latest' (out/latest itself is NOT created by the skill — it's just reserved in the ignore rule)

Receipt written to out/<date>/receipts/<output>.<ext>.md (e.g. out/<date>/receipts/streeteasy_listings.csv.md, NOT streeteasy_listings.md) with frontmatter: timestamp, model, params, artifact_sha (git hash-object of ARTIFACT.md)
Receipt body contains a generation log (source, row count, errors/notes)
Recipe body has Goal/Steps/Output/Output Log Format sections
Passes Lego Test (generic name, specifics in params)
params: contains only genuinely variable values (e.g. zip_code) — no padding with hardcoded thresholds

evals.name: plan-buy-vs-rent
evals.prompt: I want to figure out if it's cheaper to buy or rent in Bushwick right now. Plan the artifacts I'd need.
assertions: Produces plan.md only (no artifact dirs, no outputs)
Steps use 'Run @artifact-dir — <why>' format
Each step has Params, Inputs (@refs or none), Output (@ref + description)
Uses numeric DIKW prefixes (0-, 1-, 2-, 3-)
Artifacts pass Lego Test (generic names, specifics in params)
DIKW layers used correctly (data=raw facts, info=reusable derivative, knowledge=analysis scripts, wisdom=decisions)
Info layer only used when derivative is independently reusable

evals.name: create-plan-artifacts-buy-vs-rent
evals.prompt: Take the buy-vs-rent plan and create all artifacts from it.
evals.prerequisites: Run eval 2 first to produce the plan.md
assertions: Produces create-plan-artifacts.md with self-contained paragraph per artifact
Inputs described abstractly (no @ wiring to specific artifacts)
Each paragraph has enough context to generate ARTIFACT.md independently
Scaffolds all artifact dirs with ARTIFACT.md (YAML frontmatter + recipe body)
Does NOT produce out/<date>/ outputs

Does NOT create a runs/ directory or any run file — run files exist only when the plan itself is executed (by prompting Claude with @<plan>.md), which is outside this skill. Verify `runs/` does not exist and no `*-run.md` files were written.
Updates plan.md with a Status section listing the scaffolded artifact dirs (must NOT point to a run file, since none was created)

evals.name: full-pipeline-passover-rain
evals.prompt: Is it always rainy on Passover in NYC?
evals.procedure: Phase 1: /artifact plan on the prompt → passover-rain-plan.md. Phase 2: /artifact create-plan-artifacts → scaffold 0-weather/ and 2-passover-rain-verdict/. Phase 3 (run-plan): invoke a subagent with the prompt 'Read @passover-rain-plan.md and execute it end-to-end.' The subagent follows the plan's own `## Run file` instructions, calling /artifact create for each step and maintaining runs/<YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM>-passover-rain-run.md. There is no /artifact run subcommand — phase 3 is the subagent reading the plan by @-reference.
assertions: Correct 2-artifact decomposition: 0-weather (generic data) + 2-verdict (knowledge script)
No unnecessary info layer (tagging/stats inside knowledge script)
Data artifact is generic (0-weather, not 0-passover-weather)
Knowledge artifact writes a Python script with PEP 723 inline deps
Script uses Hebrew calendar lib + statistical test
All 3 phases complete (plan → scaffold → run-plan via subagent prompted with @passover-rain-plan.md)
Outputs in 0-weather/out/<date>/ and 2-passover-rain-verdict/out/<date>/ with receipts under out/<date>/receipts/<output>.<ext>.md (e.g. daily_weather.csv.md, verdict.md.md)
Each artifact root contains a .gitignore (out/* except out/latest); out/latest itself is NOT created by the skill
Scripts are self-contained (uv run with no external setup)
runs/ directory exists at the eval-4 root (sibling to passover-rain-plan.md)
Exactly one run file matching runs/<YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM>-passover-rain-run.md (local-time timestamp, not UTC)
Run file frontmatter contains: plan: passover-rain-plan.md; started: ISO 8601 local time; status: completed; plan_sha equal to `git hash-object passover-rain-plan.md`; reused_artifacts: []
Run file Progress table has 2 rows (0-weather, 2-passover-rain-verdict), both Status=done with matching Output Date column
Run file ## Log section has two ### entries (one per artifact) appended in execution order — 0-weather before 2-passover-rain-verdict
